Phar fully realized by Gregory Beaver and Marcus Boerger.

Directive => Local Value => Master Value

Module Name

Environment

Variable => Value
TERM => xterm-256color
SHELL => /bin/bash
USER => testuser
PATH => /usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin
HOME => /home/testuser
LANG => en_US.UTF-8
EDITOR => vim
LOGNAME => testuser
COLORTERM => truecolor
_ => /usr/local/bin/php

PHP Variables

Variable => Value
$_SERVER['TERM'] => xterm-256color
$_SERVER['SHELL'] => /bin/bash
$_SERVER['USER'] => testuser
$_SERVER['PATH'] => /usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin
$_SERVER['HOME'] => /home/testuser
$_SERVER['LANG'] => en_US.UTF-8
$_SERVER['EDITOR'] => vim
$_SERVER['LOGNAME'] => testuser
$_SERVER['COLORTERM'] => truecolor
$_SERVER['_'] => /usr/local/bin/php
$_SERVER['PHP_SELF'] => Standard input code
$_SERVER['SCRIPT_NAME'] => Standard input code
$_SERVER['SCRIPT_FILENAME'] => 
$_SERVER['PATH_TRANSLATED'] => 
$_SERVER['DOCUMENT_ROOT'] => 
$_SERVER['REQUEST_TIME_FLOAT'] => 1700000000.0000
$_SERVER['REQUEST_TIME'] => 1700000000
$_SERVER['argv'] => Array
(
    [0] => Standard input code
)

$_SERVER['argc'] => 1
$_ENV['TERM'] => xterm-256color
$_ENV['SHELL'] => /bin/bash
$_ENV['USER'] => testuser
$_ENV['PATH'] => /usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin
$_ENV['HOME'] => /home/testuser
$_ENV['LANG'] => en_US.UTF-8
$_ENV['EDITOR'] => vim
$_ENV['LOGNAME'] => testuser
